lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to validate the AX Gauss/Guardian fit, power budget and reinforcement layout.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Anaconda ship page — manufacturer specs, hardpoint/utility counts, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, military/optional internals, and engineering blueprint data behind the AX loadout tables.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Anaconda shipyard page — hull stats and price, plus AX weapon tech-brokers and Guardian material traders.

sources.label: Fandom
sources.what: Anaconda hull profile, fighter-hangar capability, and role notes backing the AX write-up.
